3107700.name: Noroi E: Nightmares
3107700.description:
🕯️ Step into the darkness of your own fears.

Noroi E: Nightmares is an auditory psychological survival horror game, where the true enemy isn't what you see… but what you hear.

This chapter of the Noroi E saga takes the player on a disturbing descent into madness, facing demonic entities and voices from the past that seek to break the protagonist's mind. Inspired by immersive narrative experiences and designed to generate constant tension, Nightmares transforms sound, silence, and suggestion into lethal weapons against the player.

🎮 Main Features

  • Auditory Psychological Horror: Sound design is the core of the experience. Whispers, creaks, and distorted screams will guide (or deceive) your path.

  • Immersive Narrative: Discover the story of David Muñoz, a man tormented by memories of his sister Mariana and the dark influence of Zerath, a demon that feeds on human fear.

  • Constant Exploration and Tension: Every space is designed to generate paranoia, uncertainty, and the feeling that you are never truly alone.

  • Demonic Entities: Some can be faced, others must only be ignored… but all of them seek your downfall.

  • Fragmented Nightmares: The story unfolds across several interconnected levels, each representing a deeper descent into the protagonist's broken mind.

  • Hybrid Camera: A hybrid camera system that switches between a first-person perspective and classic fixed camera angles, in the style of games like Silent Hill and Resident Evil.

  • Objectives and Secrets achievements to unlock.

🏚️ Setting

  • Lab Demo: Initial Nightmare where we discover a little about the protagonist

  • The Family Home: A place marked by tragedies and voices from the past.

  • The Psychiatric Hospital: Where sanity crumbles.

  • The Cursed Mansion: Inhabited by echoes and specters of the ritual.

  • The Cursed Town: Enveloped in darkness and forgotten sacrifices.

  • The Caves of Hell: A labyrinth where reality ceases to exist.

Each level is designed to tell a part of the nightmare and envelop the player in an oppressive atmosphere.

🔥 What Makes Noroi E: Nightmares Unique?

  • It doesn't rely on cheap jumpscares, but on a progressive horror that wears down the player's mind.

  • Every sound can be a clue… or a deadly trap.

  • It combines exploration, survival, and narrative into an experience unique to its genre.

  • It is part of the Noroi E universe, awarded as Best Mexican Horror Game 2023 and 2024.

🧩 Synopsis

David Muñoz finds himself trapped in a cycle of nightmares. The voices in his head haunts him, but he is not alone. Meanwhile, Zerath and Mammon, the demons behind the curse, manipulates his thoughts and emotions, feeding on pain and fear. The player must survive the descent into this nightmare, facing visions, fragmented memories, and indescribable horrors to discover the truth… or get lost in the darkness forever.

⚙️ Technical Details

  • Platform: PC (Windows)

  • Genre: Psychological Horror / Survival Horror

  • Style: Immersive narrative, exploration, auditory tension

  • Voice language: Spanish (with support for English, Portuguese and Italian subtitles and Documents Reading)

👁️ For Lovers of…

If you enjoyed games like:

  • Silent Hill 2

  • Amnesia: The Dark Descent

  • Fears to Fathom

  • Resident Evil (the more psychological moments)

…then Noroi E: Nightmares is for you.

英语, 意大利语, 德语, 西班牙语 - 拉丁美洲*, 日语, 葡萄牙语 - 巴西, 俄语
*具有完全音频支持的语言
